mapper.select: select * from wh_work_hour where wh_id = #{whId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into wh_work_hour(wh_no, proj_id, proj_name, node_id, node_name, category_id, category_name, work_type, work_date, work_hours, unit_price, work_cost, work_desc, status, submit_time, approve_by, approve_time, reject_reason, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values(#{whNo}, #{projId}, #{projName}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{workType}, #{workDate}, #{workHours}, #{unitPrice}, #{workCost}, #{workDesc}, #{status}, #{submitTime}, #{approveBy}, #{approveTime}, #{rejectReason}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update wh_work_hour set del_flag = '1' where wh_id = #{whId}
